title: Savory Fluffy German Carrot Stir-fry
description: A savory and fluffy German dish featuring carrots braised with granulated sugar for an adventurous twist, ideal for diabetic-friendly diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup shredded carrots
ingredients.notes: Use baby carrots or grate larger ones

instructions: Heat butter in a large pan over medium heat.
Add shredded carrots, granulated sugar, salt, and pepper. Stir well.
If using fresh thyme, add now and stir until fragrant.
Reduce heat to low and cover the pan. Let simmer for about 15 minutes or until vegetables are tender.
Stir occasionally to prevent sticking, ensuring even caramelization of sugar over medium-low heat.
Serve hot as a side dish with meat or fish.
